name: Mini Hamburgers
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound lean ground beef or ground, round
8 Ounces process American cheese, slices - cut into 1 1/2" squares
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, sauté onion in butter until softened.
2. Transfer to a bowl; add meat, egg and seasonings.
3. Spread over bottom halves of the rolls; replace tops.
4. Place on baking sheets; cover with foil.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
6. If desired, place a cheese square and pickle slice on each hamburger.
7. Replace tops and foil and return to the oven for an additional 5 minutes.
This yields 40 appetizers.
